style_block: cozy-noir painterly illustration, warm amber and deep plum and teal palette, single warm key light from upper-left at 45 degrees, teal fill in shadows, visible brush texture, no photorealism, no pixel art

portraits.template: {trigger} {style}, bust portrait of {subject}, 3/4 view facing screen-left, flat dark-teal vignette background, no hands, no props crossing frame

vips.template: {trigger} {style}, dramatic bust portrait of {subject}, 3/4 view facing screen-left, subtle neon magenta accent, dark-teal vignette background

ingredients.template: {trigger} {style}, single {subject} as a game item sprite, centered, whole object fully visible, dark plum plain background, no text

tools.template: {trigger} {style}, single {subject} bar tool as a game item illustration, centered, dark plum plain background

backgrounds.template: {trigger} {style}, {subject}, wide dim cocktail bar interior, shelves of glowing bottles, candle-lit counter, atmospheric depth

ui.template: {subject}, flat game UI element, warm amber and deep plum palette, clean silhouette, centered on plain background
